create table __CRP_AccessProfile
(
Id	int identity primary key	,
ModuleActivated	bit null	,
AccessProfileName	nvarchar(max)	,
CreationUserId	int	,
CreationTime	datetime	,
isDefault	bit null	,
Administration	bit null	,
FaAdmin	bit null	,
FAUpdateByArticle	bit null	,
FAStappleDruck	bit null	,
FAExcelUpdateWerk	bit null	,
FAExcelUpdateWunsh	bit null	,
FACommissionert	bit null	,
FAProductionPlannung	bit null	,
FAPriesZeitUpdate	bit null	,
FAUpdateByFA	bit null	,
FAFehlrMaterial	bit null	,
FAStorno	bit null	,
FAErlidegen	bit null	,
FADrucken	bit null	,
FAStucklist	bit null	,
FAAuswertungEndkontrolle	bit null	,
FALaufkarteSchneiderei	bit null	,
FAStatusAlbania	bit null	,
FAStatusCzech	bit null	,
FAStatusTunisia	bit null	,
FAPlannung	bit null	,
FAPlannungTechnick	bit null	,
FAAKtualTerminUpdate	bit null	,
FAUpdateBemerkungExtern	bit null	,
FAWerkWunshAdmin 	bit null	,
Fertigung 	bit null	,
FaCreate 	bit null	,
FaEdit 	bit null	,
FaDelete 	bit null	,
FaHomeUpdate 	bit null	,
FaHomeAnalysis 	bit null	,
FaDatenView 	bit null	,
FaDatenEdit 	bit null	,
FaPlanningView 	bit null	,
FaPlanningEdit 	bit null	,
FaABView 	bit null	,
FaABEdit 	bit null	,
FaTechnicView 	bit null	,
FaTechnicEdit 	bit null	,
FaAnalysis 	bit null	,
FaActionDelete 	bit null	,
FaActionComplete 	bit null	,
FaActionBook 	bit null	,
FaActionPrint 	bit null	,
FertigungLog 	bit null	,
UBGStatusChange 	bit null	,
FATerminWerk bit null	,
FABemerkungPlannug bit null	,
FABemerkungZuPrio bit null	,
FABemerkungZuGewerk bit null	,
FACreateHorizon1	bit null	,
FACreateHorizon2	bit null	,
FACreateHorizon3	bit null	,
FAUpdateTerminHorizon1	bit null	,
FAUpdateTerminHorizon2	bit null	,
FAUpdateTerminHorizon3	bit null	,
FACancelHorizon1 bit null	,
FACancelHorizon2 bit null	,
FACancelHorizon3 bit null	,
DelforCreate	bit null	,
DelforReport	bit null	,
DelforOrderConfirmation	bit null	,
DelforView	bit null	,
DelforDelete	bit null	,
DelforDeletePosition	bit null	,
[Statistics]	bit null	,
StatsStockCS	bit null	,
StatsStockExternalWarehouse	bit null	,
StatsStockFG	bit null	,
Configuration	bit null	,
ConfigurationAppoitments	bit null	,
ConfigurationReplacements	bit null	,
ConfigurationChangeEmployees	bit null	,
StatsCapaHorizons	bit null	,
StatsCapaPlanning	bit null	,
DelforStatistics	bit null	,
DLFPosHorizon1	bit null	,
DLFPosHorizon2	bit null	,
DLFPosHorizon3	bit null	,
Forecast	bit null	,
ForecastCreate	bit null	,
ForecastDelete	bit null	,
ForecastStatistics	bit null	,
CRPFAPlannung	bit null	,
)

alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add StatsCreatedInvoices bit null
alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add StatsBacklogFG bit null
alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add StatsDeliveries bit null
alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add StatsFAAnderungshistoire bit null
alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add StatsAnteileingelasteteFA bit null
alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add StatsLagerbestandFGCRP bit null
alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add SystemLogs bit null
alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add CRPPlanning bit null
alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add CRPUBGPlanning bit null
alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add CRPRequirement bit null
alter table __CRP_AccessProfile add StatsCapaPlanning bit null
